Revenue Driver Analysis — Jan–May 2025 vs 2026

Rev/Day = $/Visit × Visits/Dr Day × Dr Days/Day  •  76 offices  •  359 named providers  •  Providers filtered to material contributors only: cumulative 90% of office production + 2% individual floor (ranked by peak year production — captures new providers)  •  Noise providers (temp, insurance, unassigned, etc.) excluded

Row & Cell Highlighting

Visual Meaning
Peach row Peach highlighted rows — office contains at least one provider forecasted using future start assumptions (FUTURE_START_ASSUMPTIONS_RAMP). Forecasts for these offices carry higher uncertainty than purely historical projections.
Generated from source data — Jan–May 2025 vs 2026 — 76 offices — Provider threshold: 90% production + 2% floor — Noise providers excluded
